name: every-harness
description: Delegate Codex work to external agent harnesses through one mailbox runtime.

interface.shortDescription: Delegate work to external agent harnesses
interface.longDescription: Agent-internal CLI for delegating work to external harnesses such as Gemini, Claude Code, OpenCode, Trae, Qoder, Kimi Code, CodeWhale, and Antigravity.
defaultPrompt: Use ehplugin run to delegate scoped work to an external harness
Use ehplugin status to inspect delegated work
Use ehplugin cancel to stop active delegated work
